message:
vdbe: enhance codegen emit_expr + add integration tests (bd-202x)

Extend emit_expr to handle BinaryOp (arithmetic, comparison, IS/IS NOT),
UnaryOp (negate, not, bitnot), CASE expressions, CAST, IsNull/IsNotNull,
and all literal types (Float, Blob, True, False). Previously only Literal
and Placeholder were supported; all other expressions emitted Null.

Add comparison codegen producing 0/1 integer results via conditional jumps.
Add CASE expression codegen for both simple (operand-based) and searched forms.

Fix AST field mismatches in integration tests (indexed_by→index_hint,
compound→compounds, window→windows, AllColumns→Star, add missing with/alias/
upsert fields).

Add 4 new integration tests verifying arithmetic, negation, CASE, and
comparison expressions flow through codegen→engine without panics.

74 tests pass, clippy clean, fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
